title: Waters SYNAPT G2-Si HDMS
description: MetaboLights MTBLS812 · Waters SYNAPT G2-Si HDMS — HDMSe traveling-wave ion mobility (TWIMS); LC-IMS-MS metabolomics of pancreatic-cancer cell lines (Drabik et al.). Per-spectrum drift time (MS:1002476) — the corpus's Waters ion-mobility exemplar, alongside Agilent DTIMS and Bruker timsTOF PASEF.
